evidence_excerpt: Synthetic user asks the assistant to separate multiple topics before answering.
interpretation: The interaction contains a bounded signal that the user needs explicit topic separation before synthesis.
recommended_use: Organize the next response by topic and avoid collapsing separate workstreams into one answer.
do_not_use_for: Do not infer a durable user trait from this single synthetic turn.
uncertainty: The example is synthetic and only demonstrates schema shape.
